results.title: Enable System Integrity Protection (SIP)
results.discussion: SIP restricts modification of protected files and directories.

results.title: Enable Gatekeeper
results.discussion: Gatekeeper enforces code signing and verifies downloaded applications.

results.title: Enable the Application Firewall
results.discussion: The macOS application firewall is disabled, exposing listening services on untrusted networks.

results.title: Enforce FileVault full-disk encryption
results.discussion: FileVault is not enabled; data at rest on this Mac is not encrypted.

results.title: Enforce password history (15)
results.discussion: Password history is not enforced, allowing reuse of recent passwords.

results.title: Enable security auditing (auditd)
results.discussion: The audit subsystem is running and configured.
